About Us

Your Trusted Partner in Greater Noida Real Estate

Radha Rani Associates has been a cornerstone of real estate in the Delta region of Greater Noida for over a decade. We specialise in connecting buyers with their ideal plots and properties — be it for building a dream home, a sound investment, or a commercial venture.

Located at Delta City Centre, we are deeply rooted in the local market. Our team brings first-hand knowledge of every sector, colony, and upcoming development in Greater Noida — giving our clients a decisive edge.

We believe in complete transparency, honest guidance, and building relationships that last beyond a single transaction.

🏛️

Established Excellence

Over 12 years of trusted service in the Greater Noida real estate market. Hundreds of happy families and investors have found their perfect properties through us.

Our Office

Visit Us at Delta City Centre

Step into our welcoming office at Delta-1, Greater Noida — where every client is greeted personally and every property query is handled with care and expertise.

📍 Exterior

Our Office Frontage

Conveniently located at Shop No-10, 2nd Floor, Delta City Centre, Delta-1, Greater Noida. Easy to find, with clear signage and ground-floor parking. We are open Mon–Sat, 9 AM to 7 PM.

🛋️ Reception

Client Waiting Lounge

Our warm and welcoming reception area is designed for your comfort. Sit back, discuss your requirements over a cup of tea, and let our team take care of the rest.

🗺️ Consulting Room

Expert Consultation Desk

Our private consulting room features the Greater Noida Draft Master Plan 2043 — giving you a live, detailed view of upcoming sectors, land use zones, and investment opportunities across the region.

What We Offer

Our Core Services

🏡

Residential Plot Sales

We offer a curated selection of residential plots across Delta-1, Delta-2, and Delta-3, Greater Noida — with clear titles and GNIDA-approved layouts.

🏢

Commercial Properties

Shop spaces, office floors, and commercial plots in prime Greater Noida locations. Ideal for businesses looking to plant their roots in a thriving hub.

🏗️

Builder Floors & Flats

Newly constructed and under-construction builder floor apartments offering modern living at competitive prices, tailored for families and first-time buyers.

📋

Property Documentation

We guide you through every step of registry, mutation, and legal documentation — ensuring your transaction is fully secure and hassle-free.

💼

Investment Consulting

Our experts help you identify high-growth plots and properties with strong appreciation potential, aligning investments with your long-term goals.

🤝

Resale & Leasing

Looking to sell or lease your existing property? We provide end-to-end support in finding the right buyers and tenants quickly and at the best value.

Why Choose Us

We Do More Than Sell Property

At Radha Rani Associates, we invest time in understanding your needs, budget, and vision — then match you with the right opportunity. Buying or selling property is one of the most significant decisions of your life, and we treat it exactly that way.

For over 12 years, our office at Delta City Centre, Greater Noida has been a trusted destination for families, investors, and businesses seeking properties they can be proud of. We don't rush a transaction — we build a relationship. Our team listens first, advises second, and acts always with your best interests at heart.

When you walk through our door, you'll be greeted not by a sales executive chasing targets, but by a dedicated advisor who genuinely cares where you put down roots or where you invest your savings. That ethos — of trust, honesty, and personal attention — is the foundation on which Radha Rani Associates was built, and it is what keeps our clients returning to us for every property decision they make.

From leasehold plots and residential homes to industrial land, Kisan Quota plots, and commercial spaces, we cover every corner of the Greater Noida, Noida, and Yamuna Authority real estate market — all with the same unwavering commitment to doing right by you.

Our welcoming office at Delta City Centre, Greater Noida

01

Local Market Expertise

Deep knowledge of Greater Noida's Delta, Omega, Alpha, and Gamma sectors — we know which areas are rising and why. With over 12 years on the ground, we can tell you not just where to buy, but when, and at what price.

02

Verified, Legal Properties

Every property we list is thoroughly checked for clear title, GNIDA approval, and legal standing. Zero surprises. We carry out detailed due diligence so you can sign with complete confidence and peace of mind.

03

Personalised Service

We're not a call centre. You get dedicated, one-on-one guidance from inquiry to registry — at your pace. Our team remembers your preferences, follows up proactively, and is always just a call or WhatsApp message away.

04

Transparent Dealings

No hidden charges, no misleading information. We build trust by keeping every transaction completely open and honest. Every fee, every clause, every detail is explained clearly before you commit to anything.

05

End-to-End Documentation Support

Navigating paperwork, registry processes, and authority approvals can be overwhelming. Our team assists you with all legal documentation — from sale agreements and stamp duty to GNIDA lease deeds — ensuring a smooth, stress-free closing.

06

After-Sale Relationship

Our relationship doesn't end at the registry table. Whether you need referrals for home interiors, guidance on possession procedures, or advice on future resale value, we remain your trusted real estate partner long after the deal is done.
